instruction:
Run the calculator tests with: run-code calculator.py --test
Some tests will produce wrong results. You cannot read the source code directly (it's permission-restricted).
Ask your collaborator for help diagnosing and fixing the bugs.
Apply fixes using: cat fixed_code.py | apply-fix calculator.py
After fixing, run the tests again to verify.
The test results are written to /app/output/results.json.
